title: Worldcoin / WLD / World Network
open_questions: Reopen the Grayscale Worldcoin ETF only on a new SEC/Nasdaq/Grayscale artifact; verify World Chain SP1 deployment/audits, prior Nitro-path exposure and whether PR #909 plus proposer bindings merge and deploy; monitor WIP-1008 implementation and WLD stake/reward/slashing parameters.
